title: Build landed cost model for 500x T-Echo including procurement, shipping, duties, insurance, brokerage, and delivery to Seattle lab
description: Using data from sibling tasks, compile full cost breakdown. Assume base unit ~5-45 after negotiation (from prior bead). Add shipping estimate, 0-6% duties, insurance (1-2% of value), clearance fees (~00-500), inland transport. Provide low/mid/high scenarios and total estimate. Document assumptions. Acceptance: clear table or structured cost summary in notes, recommended budget.
